Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Sifan Hassan confirms INSANE programme at Paris Olympics 2024

Dutch long-distance star Sifan Hassan announced on Wednesday that she will seeks an historic treble at the Paris Olympics 2024.

Dutch long-distance starSifan Hassanannounced on Wednesday she would run themarathonin addition to defending her5 000mand10 000mOlympic titles from Tokyo, as she seeks anhistoric treble.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

The 31-year-old is seeking to become the first woman to win gold in the three events, emulating the great Czech athlete Emil Zapotek, who achieved the men’s triple in Helsinki in 1952.

“I am excited to announce I will run the 5 000m, 10 000m, and the marathon here in Paris,” Hassan said on social media.

“I am a curious person looking forward to the challenges, and trying to find out what is possible. I love the journey as much as the challenge,” she added.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

Sifan Hassan is no stranger to making history.

At the Tokyo Games, she became the first athlete ever to win medals (two gold, one bronze) in the 1 500m, 5 000m, and 10 000m.

Dropping the 1 500m to run the marathon is a step into the unknown, she acknowledged, although she is not a novice at the latter having made a stunning debut in winning last year’s London Marathon.

“Did I balance speed on the track with enough endurance in the marathon? Let’s find out together,” she said.

“It’s not easy to face the unknown but my curiosity has driven all my training towards this goal. I will try my best to succeed.”

The schedule will certainly test her powers of recovery.

The 10 000m final is scheduled for 21:00 (SA time) on Friday, 9 August, only 35 hours before the marathon starts at 08:00 (SA time) on Sunday, 11 August.

Before that, she will run 5 000m heats on 2 August with a likely final on 5 August – a total of 62.195km of Olympic competition.

“It has been a huge challenge to prepare myself because the way of running, the energy required… everything is different between track and the marathon,” she said.

Hassan arrived in the Netherlands as a 15-year-old refugee from Ethiopia but has never explained why she left her native country.

In Tokyo, she recovered from a dramatic fall in the 1 500m to snatch bronze, before bouncing back from that disappointment to secure gold in the 5 000m and 10 000m.

Her Paris ambitions impressed US track legendMichael Johnson, who wrote on hisaccount on X, formerly Twitter: “For anyone else this would be insane!”

“I don’t believe there’s ever been an athlete who enjoys racing more than Sifan Hassan,” he said.

title: Sifan Hassan confirms INSANE programme at Paris Olympics 2024
author: AFP
description: Dutch long-distance star Sifan Hassan announced on Wednesday that she will seeks an historic treble at the Paris Olympics 2024.
